positive: A stylized, symmetrical cosmic floral arrangement. Featuring oversized, glowing ethereal flowers and intricate celestial vines encircling a central stylized crescent moon. The artwork must be rendered in a high-contrast, elegant linocut engraving style, with clean, bold black lines and crisp negative space. Minimalist Art Nouveau influence, designed as a vector print for apparel. Centered composition, deep contrast, suitable for screen printing, graphic design, clean silhouette.
